items.title: Open all those Prime Day boxes safely with Slice’s retractable ceramic cutter at $16 new all-time low
items.summary:
Slice retractable box cutter with ceramic blade

Buy for $16.50 (Reg. $22)

Prime-exclusive discount.

What we love

Slice’s retractable ceramic cutter is a handy tool for opening packages, cutting through packing tape, and slicing plastic wrapping, with a blade that is less likely to nick your fingers than a traditional utility knife. It has a reinforced nylon body, a comfortable grip, and a hooked shape that lets you hang it up or stash it away easily when it is not in use.

items.title: WD’s 2TB Xbox Series X|S Expansion card hits lowest price of the year for Prime Day at $212
items.summary: As part of its ongoing Prime Day sale, Amazon is offering WD_BLACK’s 2TB C50 Storage Expansion Card for Xbox Series X|S at $212.59 shipped. This model typically sells for $250 and has seen little to no notable discounts for most of this year. Today’s offer takes roughly 15% off the regular price and marks the return of the lowest price it briefly hit a couple of months back. Though not a huge price drop, it’s still a notable one that makes it worth considering, especially since the 1TB drive itself is currently at $150.

This is Meta’s entry-level VR headset, which launched back in 2024 for $299.99 before getting a price increase this year to $349.99. So it’s not exactly the most exciting deal, but it’s about as good as you’re likely […]

items.title: The best Prime Day deals we found on our favorite gear
items.summary: Amazon’s Prime Day is on, and it’s happening for the next four days. Prime members can jump into the deals now until the sale officially ends at 3:01AM ET / 12:01AM PT June 27th. Many discounts will remain the same throughout the duration. We’ve been covering Prime Day in-depth since the shopping event debuted over […]

items.title: Segway’s Navimow Prime Day Sale drops the premium X430 + X450 Robotic Lawn Mowers to new lows starting from $2,099, more
items.summary: Coinciding with the full momentum of Amazon’s Prime Day Sale, Segway has launched its parallel Navimow Prime Day Sale that is giving us the best prices this year on new and legacy robot mowers. Of course, for me, the biggest inclusion is the new X430 Robotic Lawn Mower down at $2,099 shipped, matching the price over at Amazon. This new model goes for $2,499 at full price, which we formerly saw discounted as low as $2,299 since hitting the market back in March. Lately, we’ve only seen free bundled gear, but during this sale (which is lasting into July) you’re able to score a larger-than-ever $400 markdown for the best new price we have tracked. You can get my hands-on take in my review of it here, as well as browse all the other deals below.

items.title: Amazon 2026 Prime Day sale now live! 4-days, millions of deals, all-time low prices [Updated]
items.summary: The 2026 Amazon Prime Day sale is now live! Amazon’s biggest sale event of the year is now officially underway with millions of price drops for the next 4-days. From Apple and Google Pixel gear through to smart home upgrades, PC gaming deals, tech accessories, smart TVs, and much more, everything is now live and up for grabs.

items.title: Odd police video shows drone removing knife from motionless suspect
items.summary: Promo video comes as more US police departments fly drones as first responders.

items.title: Segway increases Prime Day savings on EVs up to 58% off, like the all-terrain ZT3 Pro e-scooter at $800 + more from $220
items.summary: Running parallel to Amazon’s Prime Day Sale event, Segway has launched its expanded Prime Day deals with up to 58% discounts on EVs. One model that saw a greater price cut from the pre-sale deals is Segway’s ZT3 Pro All-Terrain Electric Scooter down at $799.99 shipped, matching the price we’re seeing over at Amazon. Despite carrying a direct $1,300 MSRP, you can often find it going for $1,000 at most these days, with discounts having mostly dropped the price to $850 in 2026. While it did drop down to $773 a single time in January, you’re otherwise looking at the best price we have tracked with the $200 savings here ($500 off the MSRP). Head below to check out the full lineup of deals while they last – especially the amazing new extra battery bundle and low prices we’re seeing on the brand’s e-bikes.

items.summary: Estella the Frenchie, 9to5Toys’ resident puppy mascot, has been hard at work sniffing out the best Prime Day pet deals, and she didn’t disappoint. With Amazon Prime Day officially live, now is a great time to stock up on all the essentials your furry friend loves, from treats and toys to food, supplements, and everyday health supplies.

items.title: Pixel Buds Pro 2 Prime Day deal just dropped even lower, now starting at $160 (30% off)
items.summary: Amazon Prime Day has now ushered in a host of deep discounts in new condition, unlocked Pixel 10 series devices – up to $400 off Pixel 10, Pixel 10 Pro, 10 Pro XL, Pixel 10 Pro Fold, and a new all-time low on Pixel 10a from $399 – as well as some Pixel Watch 4 deals. And now, the latest Pixel Buds Pro 2 have now dropped even lower than the Prime Day deal we spotted this morning to 30% off.

items.title: Today’s Apple Books and audiobook deals from $1
items.summary: Prime Day is rolling with millions of price drops over at Amazon, but we also have a fresh lineup of the best Apple Books deals for you as well. Highlights include Scent of Murder, Dear Debbie, The Bourbon Thief, I’ve Got a Home in Glory Land, Death Times Seven, You Belong Here (Unabridged), The Things We Never Say, and more. Just be sure to dive into the $150 price drop on AirPods Max 2 and the nearly 30% price drop on AirPods Pro 3 if you’re looking to upgrade your audiobook experience.
